description: Simple web app for adding, completing, filtering, and deleting personal tasks.

tasks.title: Create web app structure
tasks.description: As a developer, I want a clean web app baseline so future stories follow the same structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Project contains folders for src, components, pages, styles, lib, and tests
App has one main layout and one home page
Project build command runs successfully

tasks.title: Persist tasks locally
tasks.description: As a user, I want tasks saved locally so I do not lose them after refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Task data includes title, status, and optional due date
Storage logic is isolated from presentational UI components
Tasks are restored after a page refresh
Build and tests pass

tasks.title: Add a task
tasks.description: As a user, I want to create a task quickly so I can track what I need to do.
acceptanceCriteria: Add-task form includes title and optional due date
Title is required before save
Saving a valid task updates the visible list immediately
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

tasks.title: View task list
tasks.description: As a user, I want to see my saved tasks so I can review what is pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks display in a readable list on the home page
Empty state appears when there are no tasks
Completed tasks are visually distinct from active tasks
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

tasks.title: Mark a task complete
tasks.description: As a user, I want to mark a task done so I can track progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task can be toggled between active and completed
Completed state persists after refresh
Task styling updates to reflect completion state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

tasks.title: Delete a task
tasks.description: As a user, I want to remove a task I no longer need so my list stays clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task can be deleted from the list
Deleted tasks are removed from storage and UI
Deleting one task does not affect others
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

tasks.title: Filter tasks by status
tasks.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks so I can focus on active or completed work.
acceptanceCriteria: Filters exist for All, Active, and Completed
Filtered results update immediately when the filter changes
Task count matches the currently visible items or clearly states what is being counted
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

tasks.title: Validate quality checks
tasks.description: As a maintainer, I want test coverage and build checks so the template stays stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover add, complete, delete, and filter behavior
Build command passes
Test command passes
